title: Arrakis emerges from stealth with $38 million to bring AI to factories and supply chains
summary: The company raised a $30 million Series A led by Blossom Capital, on top of a seven and a half million dollar seed round led by Accel that closed in March.
caption: output/2026-07-22/arrakis-emerges-from-stealth-with-38-million-to-bring-ai-to-factories-.txt
